entities.name: CAJANUS PLATYCARPUS
entities.description: A wild species used as a donor for cytoplasmic male sterility in pigeonpea

entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: Cultivated crop crossed with Cajanus platycarpus to introduce male sterility

entities.name: EMBRYO RESCUE
entities.description: Technique used to facilitate the cross between Cajanus platycarpus and cultivated pigeonpea

entities.name: TISSUE CULTURE
entities.description: Technique used to facilitate the cross between Cajanus platycarpus and cultivated pigeonpea

entities.name: CYTOPLASMIC MALE STERILITY
entities.description: A condition where male fertility is absent due to cytoplasmic factors, observed in advance generation lines

entities.name: ICPL 85010
entities.description: A pigeonpea cultivar that restored fertility in cytoplasmic male sterile lines

entities.name: CLASMOGAMOUS FLOWERS
entities.description: Flowers that open, observed in the male sterile lines

entities.name: DI-ADLEPHOUS BUNDLE
entities.description: A specific anther arrangement that failed to form in male sterile lines

entities.name: CYTOLOGICAL ANALYSIS
entities.description: Method used to examine meiosis and pollen development in anthers

entities.name: MEIOSIS
entities.description: Cell division process analyzed in anthers to determine the stage of sterility

entities.name: POLLEN GRAINS
entities.description: Male gametophytes that may become sterile or fail to dehisce

entities.name: DEHISCENCE
entities.description: The process of anther wall opening to release pollen, the absence of which creates functional sterility

entities.name: POLLEN MOTHER CELLS
entities.description: Cells that undergo meiosis to produce pollen grains; their absence leads to premeiotic sterility

entities.name: SEPALOUS ANTHERS
entities.description: Anthers that develop without pollen mother cells

entities.name: PREMEIOTIC STERILITY
entities.description: A mechanism of male sterility where pollen mother cells are not formed
